notes: Game does not start. Opened an issue: https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2169
title: Epic Battle Fantasy 4

notes: Game does not launch, no error message
title: Epic Battle Fantasy 4

notes: Won't Work. But Flash (.swf) verison is playable on internet.
title: Epic Battle Fantasy 4

notes: Must delete kernel32.dll and user32.dll from virtual drive as explained in GitHub ticket. This must be done again after updates.
title: Epic Battle Fantasy 4

notes:
Game runs perfectly after renaming four files in the game's prefix:
Open [the directory where your games are installed]/steamapps/compatdata/265610/pxf/drive_c/windows/system32.  Rename kernel32.dll to kernel32_bak.dll and user32.dll to user32_bak.dll (or something similar).
Then go into /steamapps/compatdata/265610/pxf/drive_c/windows/syswow64 and rename kernel32.dll and user32.dll in this directory also.

Similar instructions on the Github:  https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2169
title: Epic Battle Fantasy 4
